steps.title: Identify the volume conversion factor
steps.content:
Given that 1 inch = 2.54 cm, we need to find how many cubic centimeters equal one cubic inch. Since volume is three-dimensional, we cube the linear scale factor:

$$1\text{ cubic inch} = (2.54)^3\text{ cubic cm}$$

The rule is: when all linear dimensions scale by factor $k$, volumes scale by $k^3$.

steps.title: Calculate the converted volume
steps.content:
Compute the scale factor:

$$(2.54)^3 = 16.387064$$

Multiply the given volume by this factor:

$$542.68 \times 16.387064 = 8892.93...$$

Rounding to the nearest whole number: 8893 cubic centimeters.
